title: Setting up an SMSF
description: How to set up a self-managed super fund (SMSF) correctly to comply with tax and superannuation laws.
keywords: Starting an SMSF, set up SMSF, Start a self-managed super fund, setup smsf, set up SMSF, setting up SMSF, how to set up SMSF

child_links.title: Choose your SMSF trustee structure
child_links.description: Understand the requirements for your SMSF depending on the trustee structure you choose.

child_links.title: Appoint your SMSF trustees
child_links.description: Understand and comply with responsibilities when appointing trustees or directors of a corporate trustee.

child_links.title: Check your SMSF is an Australian super fund
child_links.description: The residency requirements your SMSF must meet to qualify for tax concessions and what to do if a member goes overseas

child_links.title: Create the SMSF trust deed
child_links.description: A trust deed needs to be prepared outlining the rules and conditions under which the SMSF will operate.

child_links.title: Holding SMSF assets
child_links.description: Understand how to assign assets during SMSF setup and the requirement for legal ownership to be in the fund's name.

child_links.title: Register your SMSF
child_links.description: You must register your fund with us to be an ATO regulated SMSF.

child_links.title: Set up your SMSF bank account
child_links.description: How to set up a bank account for your self-managed super fund to process contributions and rollovers, and pay expenses.

child_links.title: Get an electronic service address
child_links.description: To receive contributions and rollovers, your SMSF will need an electronic service address (ESA).

child_links.title: Create your SMSF investment strategy
child_links.description: Understand SMSF investment requirements and creating your fund's investment strategy.

child_links.title: Prepare an exit plan
child_links.description: Having a plan for when to wind up your SMSF will make it easier for you later, especially if the unexpected occurs

source_title: Setting up an SMSF | Australian Taxation Office
source_description: How to set up a self-managed super fund (SMSF) correctly to comply with tax and superannuation laws.
